rulings.Case Title: TANGLEFOOT MASTER BUILDERS, INC., A FOREIGN VS. LYNNE E. CRAWFORD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application To Lift Stay And Dismiss Action For Failure To Prosecute
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 6, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANT LYNNE CRAWFORD'S Application To Lift Stay And Dismiss Action For Failure To Prosecute. MOTION TO LIFT STAY AND DISMISS DENIED. PLAINTIFF TO COMMENCE ARBITRATION PROCEEDING WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ORDER. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR BOND DENIED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN LYNCH et al VS. JAMES P QUINN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 6, 2011, line 4, PLAINTIFFS KAREN LYNCH AND EFRAIN LOPEZ MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES. MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS DENIED. THAT CASE IS IRRELEVANT TO THE COURT'S INQUIRY HERE. PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL ARE AWARDED $195,800. (FEES BASED ON FEE REQUEST MINUS A 10% REDUCTION FOR VAGUE ENTRIES, INCONSISTENT RECORD KEEPING, BLOCK BILLING AND BILLING IN .25 INCREMENTS.) PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL IS ALSO ENTITLED TO A 1.25 LODESTAR ENHANCEMENT. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 6, 2011, line 3, PLAINTIFF NATHANIEL JONES Motion Compelling Responses To Written Interrogatories, And Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions. GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO PAY $300 AS REASONABLE SANCTIONS. COURT REVIEWED UNTIMELY OPPOSITION. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: EVA HALL VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 6, 2011, line 5, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: EVA HALL VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 6, 2011, line 5, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST CLEARLY AND CONCISELY PLEAD FACTS STATING A CAUSE OF ACTION AS TO THIS DEFENDANT. BOTH CAUSES OF ACTION MUST BE PLED IN THE SAME COMPLAINT AND PLAINTIFF MUST SET FORTH HOW, WHEN, WHERE, WHAT AND TO WHOM THE MISREPRESENTATION OR CONCEALMENT OCCURRED AS TO THIS DEFENDANT. =(302/LMG)
